reviews.review_description: Sir, this is the typa thing I would find in a mobile game ad. THE MOVEMENT WAS SO JANKY. I would be walking foward and the next second, I am walking  into the sunset. Gun sounds cool, but guns are ABSOLUTELY BOOTY. Waste of money. Fix ur game big boy

reviews.review_title: Fun but could use some improvements
reviews.review_description:
I find this game very fun except for the physics since if my car lightly touches something everything goes flying everywhere which takes a long time to pick up and is very annoying and it also sucks that we can't save our progress.

But overall pretty fun
There needs to be a remodel of the movement system, just that and the game is good to go.
